title: LEFT Join giving duplicate records for matching records from right table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE REF_MEDIA_OUTLET (MEDIA_OUTLET_ID INT NOT NULL, NAME VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ACTIVE_YN CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'Y', PRIMARY KEY (MEDIA_OUTLET_ID));
INSERT INTO REF_MEDIA_OUTLET (MEDIA_OUTLET_ID, NAME, ACTIVE_YN) VALUES (96, 'BET', 'Y');
INSERT INTO REF_MEDIA_OUTLET (MEDIA_OUTLET_ID, NAME, ACTIVE_YN) VALUES (166, 'BET Her', 'Y');
CREATE TABLE SEC_DIVISION (DIVISION_ID INT NOT NULL, DIVISION_NAME VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, ACTIVE_YN CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'Y', INCLUDE_IN_CLUSTER CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'Y', PRIMARY KEY (DIVISION_ID));
INSERT INTO SEC_DIVISION (DIVISION_NAME, ACTIVE_YN, INCLUDE_IN_CLUSTER) VALUES ('Kids Nets', 'Y', 'Y');

SELECT * FROM REF_MEDIA_OUTLET RMO LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MEDIA_OUTLET_ID FROM SEC_DIVISION_NET_SUB_QUERY WHERE DIVISION_ID IN (SELECT DIVISION_ID FROM SEC_DIVISION_NET_SUB_QUERY WHERE MEDIA_OUTLET_ID= 96 AND ACTIVE_YN='Y' AND DIVISION_ID NOT IN (SELECT DIVISION_ID FROM SEC_DIVISION WHERE INCLUDE_IN_CLUSTER='N' AND ACTIVE_YN='Y')) AND ACTIVE_YN='Y') T ON T.MEDIA_OUTLET_ID=RMO.MEDIA_OUTLET_ID;
key_bug_features: LEFT Join causing duplicate records from right table
